summary: Typed verification.acceptance_criteria in the plan artifact.

approach.description: Add the acceptance_criteria and out_of_scope fields to the verification block.

verification.test_strategy: End-to-end plan.Parse over a fixture carrying acceptance_criteria.
verification.rollback_plan: Revert the PR. Every field is additive and optional within standard_v1.

acceptance_criteria.statement: A plan whose verification carries acceptance_criteria parses and round-trips the criteria.
A non-blocking criterion with preconditions decodes with blocking=false.
acceptance_criteria.rationale: Inferred from ADR-049 #3's default-true blocking semantics; must prove an explicit false round-trips.
acceptance_criteria.verify_hint: Assert the decoded Blocking pointer is non-nil and false.
preconditions: The acceptance executor has run at least once.

out_of_scope: Downstream acceptance execution (E31.5/E31.7) is not implemented here.
